name: BWR Exploration Inc.
summary: BWR Exploration Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of precious and base metal properties in Canada. The company explores for copper, zinc, lead, silver, and gold deposits. Its flagship property is the Little Stull Lake Gold Project covering an area of 38,335 hectares located in northeastern Manitoba. The company was formerly known as Black Widow Resources Inc. and changed its name to BWR Exploration Inc. in October 2016. BWR Exploration Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
